evals.prompt: 用 Visio 画一个通用审批流程：提交申请 -> 部门审批 -> 金额是否超过阈值 -> 财务复核 / 直接归档 -> 结束。要求使用 Visio 自带形状和动态连接线。
evals.expected_output: Defaults to foreground visible Visio COM automation even though the prompt does not explicitly request visible mode, creates a .vsdx file, classifies this as a generic flowchart, uses built-in flowchart masters, and verifies default right-angle/orthogonal dynamic connectors.
assertions: The response or generated script defaults to New-VisibleVisioApplication or Visio.Application with Visible=true when the user does not explicitly request background mode.
The workflow classifies the request as a generic flowchart and selects a flowchart stencil such as BASFLO_M.VSSX, BASFLO_U.VSSX, or SSFLOW_M.VSSX.
The workflow opens a Visio stencil and drops masters rather than generating raw .vsdx XML or drawing only primitive rectangles.
The workflow defaults to right-angle/orthogonal dynamic connectors when the user did not explicitly request straight lines.
The verification checks OneD connectors and orthogonal routing cells.

evals.prompt: 把我给的白板截图复刻成可编辑 Visio 图：里面混合了系统、人工步骤、数据库和外部接口。不要只照着颜色画，先按图形含义选择 Visio 自带 master，所有箭头都要能随形状移动。
evals.expected_output: Classifies screenshot elements by semantic meaning, chooses suitable built-in Visio stencils/masters rather than overfitting to one diagram family, glues connector endpoints, saves .vsdx, and exports a preview.
assertions: The solution identifies semantic element types before selecting shapes.
It uses built-in Visio masters by NameU when suitable and uses basic shapes only for elements without semantic masters.
It glues dynamic connector endpoints so arrows move with shapes.
It exports or otherwise verifies a visual preview before claiming completion.

evals.prompt: 我已经打开了一个 .vsdx 文件，请把里面所有连接线从直角改成直线，不要关闭我的 Visio 窗口。
evals.expected_output: Attaches to the open Visio document through ROT when locked, updates ShapeRouteStyle and ConLineRouteExt on OneD connector shapes, saves without closing the visible window.
assertions: The solution uses ROT attachment or equivalent if the file is already locked by visible Visio.
It updates only OneD connector shapes.
It saves the document without closing the user's visible Visio window.

evals.prompt: 帮我用 Visio 画一个我没在技能文档里列过的图，例如 UML 组件图或网络拓扑。请不要猜基础矩形，先自己查找可用 stencil/master，验证后再使用。
evals.expected_output: Runs local stencil/master discovery with domain-specific search terms, creates a tiny proof .vsdx with a discovered master, and records reusable discoveries in the reference catalog when useful.
assertions: The workflow searches installed Visio stencils instead of giving up.
It uses domain-specific query terms or PreferredStencilRegex instead of broad unfiltered discovery whenever possible.
It verifies a discovered master by dropping it into a real Visio document.
It updates the skill reference catalog with verified master names.

evals.prompt: 我给你一张系统流程图截图，请最大限度复刻成可编辑 Visio：节点坐标和大小尽量贴近原图；图里有直角连接线、斜直线连接线和一条曲线箭头，必须按原图线型分别还原，端点要能随节点移动。
evals.expected_output: Builds an intermediate image reconstruction model with pixel-to-Visio coordinate mapping, recreates nodes with native Visio masters when possible, preserves orthogonal/straight/curved connector route types, glues endpoints, exports a preview, and compares it with the source image.
assertions: The workflow creates or describes a pixel-to-Visio coordinate mapping before drawing.
It builds an intermediate model for nodes, connectors, route types, waypoints or control points, arrowheads, and labels.
It preserves right-angle connectors as orthogonal, straight connectors as straight, and curved connectors with ConLineRouteExt=2 or an equivalent native curved Visio connector.
It glues connector endpoints to relative positions on target shapes so arrows move with nodes.
It exports a preview PNG and compares the preview against the source image before claiming completion.

evals.prompt: 我已经把截图识别结果整理成 JSON：里面有 source 图片尺寸、每个节点的 bounds、semanticType、文本，以及 connector 的 from/to、routeType、fromPoint/toPoint。请直接生成可编辑 Visio。
evals.expected_output: Uses Convert-ImageReconstructionToVisio or the equivalent structured image-to-visio pipeline, maps pixel bounds to Visio page coordinates, preserves connector route types and relative glue points, creates .vsdx and PNG preview.
assertions: The workflow treats the JSON as the image reconstruction contract instead of asking for OCR/CV again.
It maps source pixel coordinates into Visio page coordinates.
It preserves orthogonal, straight, and curved connector route types.
It passes relative glue points through to the Visio connector helper.
It saves a .vsdx and exports a preview PNG.
